zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Welles於大約1425年出生在英國林可爾史爾時，她的父親Sir Lionel De Welles , Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby20歲，母親Joan de Waterton26歲。她於1439年與Sir James Lawrence在英國結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1480年7月3日在英國倫敦享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Welles于大约1425年出生在英国林可爾史爾时，她的父亲Sir Lionel De Welles , Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby20岁，母亲Joan de Waterton26岁。她于1439年与Sir James Lawrence在英国结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1480年7月3日在英国倫敦享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Welles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wells
meanings: English: habitational name from Wells next the Sea (Norfolk) or Wells (Somerset), both named with the plural of Old English wella ‘spring, stream’, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a group of springs or streams.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dupuis   ‘from the well’.
History: One of numerous early immigrants from England bearing this name was Thomas Welles, governor of colonial CT, who was in Hartford, CT, by 1636.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Welles was born about 1425, in Lincolnshire, England, her father, Sir Lionel De Welles , Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby, was 20 and her mother, Joan de Waterton, was 26. She married Sir James Lawrence in 1439, in England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 3 July 1480, in London, England, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Welles est née environ 1425, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Lionel De Welles , Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Joan de Waterton, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir James Lawrence en 1439, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 juillet 1480, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Welles um 1425 in Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Lionel De Welles , Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby 20 und ihre Mutter Joan de Waterton 26. Sie hat 1439 in England Sir James Lawrence geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. Juli 1480 im Alter von 56 Jahren in London, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Welles è nata il circa 1425 nel Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Sir Lionel De Welles , Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Joan de Waterton, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir James Lawrence nel 1439, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 3 luglio 1480, nel London, England, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Wellesが約1425年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Lionel De Welles , Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsbyは20歳，母Joan de Watertonは26歳であった。1439年にイギリスでSir James Lawrenceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1480年7月3日にイギリスロンドンで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Welles(이)가 대략 1425년 영국 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Lionel De Welles , Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Waterton(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1439년 영국에서 Sir James Lawrence(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1480년 7월 3일 영국 런던에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Welles nasceu aproximadamente 1425, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Lionel De Welles , Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Waterton, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir James Lawrence em 1439, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de julho de 1480, em London, Inglaterra, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Welles родилась около 1425 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Lionel De Welles , Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Waterton, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir James Lawrence в 1439 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 3 июля 1480 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor Welles nació aproximadamente 1425, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Lionel De Welles , Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Joan de Waterton, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sir James Lawrence en 1439, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 3 de julio de 1480, en London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años.
